'''Baradas II''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Baradas system/Legends|Baradas system]]. The planet was ruled by Baron [[Rovan Tresario]] who founded the [[House Tresario|Tresario Bounty Hunters Guild]], an organization of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] whom hunted down [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]].

{{Planet-stub}}
